english: Golden Rooster Stands on One Leg
visual: Tall one-legged stance with the raised knee lifted to waist height and the same-side hand raised high with fingers pointing up.
motion_description: From a wide stance, weight shifts completely to the left leg as the right knee is continuously drawn up to waist height. Concurrently, the right hand smoothly rises to chin level with fingers pointing up, while the left arm presses down near the hip, culminating in a deliberate one-legged hold. The right foot steps firmly back down, smoothly transferring weight to the right leg with the torso remaining squared forward. The motion then symmetrically repeats as the left knee and left hand rise in a steady flow for another balanced pause.
